features.description: Project scaffolding - Initialize Next.js frontend with Tailwind CSS
features.acceptance: Next.js app runs locally, Tailwind configured

features.description: Project scaffolding - Initialize FastAPI backend with SQLite
features.acceptance: FastAPI server runs, SQLite database created

features.description: Authentication - Firebase Auth integration with MFA
features.acceptance: Users can sign up/login, MFA enabled

features.description: RBAC - Role-based access control (Resident, Admin, Super-admin)
features.acceptance: Three roles implemented with proper permissions

features.description: Live Money Feed - Razorpay API integration for transaction ingestion
features.acceptance: Transactions polled every 5min, stored in DB

features.description: Live Money Feed - Test mode with simulated transactions
features.acceptance: Test data generates realistic transactions

features.description: Shame Dashboard - Real-time financial metrics display
features.acceptance: Balance, inflows/outflows, unmatched entries shown

features.description: Shame Dashboard - Transaction attribution (name/role)
features.acceptance: Each transaction shows who approved it

features.description: Receipt Snap - Document upload (PDF, images, Excel/CSV)
features.acceptance: Files upload successfully to cloud storage

features.description: Receipt Snap - OCR integration for receipt data extraction
features.acceptance: Amount, date, vendor extracted from receipts

features.description: Receipt Snap - Auto-match transactions within ±2 hours
features.acceptance: Receipts matched to UPI entries automatically

features.description: Receipt Snap - Flag levels (Red/Yellow/Green)
features.acceptance: Mismatches flagged with appropriate color

features.description: Chat Guard - Claude Agent SDK integration
features.acceptance: AI agent responds to basic queries

features.description: Chat Guard - Natural language financial queries
features.acceptance: Users can query transactions in plain language

features.description: Chat Guard - Bye-laws knowledge base integration
features.acceptance: Responses include compliance references

features.description: Challenge Mode - Dispute initiation via dashboard/chat
features.acceptance: Residents can flag suspicious transactions

features.description: Challenge Mode - 48-hour resolution timer
features.acceptance: Auto-reject after 48h without evidence

features.description: Challenge Mode - Push notifications for disputes
features.acceptance: Users notified of new challenges/resolutions

features.description: Security - AES-256 encryption for sensitive data
features.acceptance: Data encrypted at rest and in transit

features.description: Security - Immutable audit trails
features.acceptance: All actions logged, no delete function

features.description: AI Analysis - Daily automated mismatch scanning
features.acceptance: Midnight cron job flags discrepancies

features.description: Notifications - Email summaries (daily/weekly)
features.acceptance: Users receive scheduled financial summaries

features.description: Mobile - Responsive design for mobile-first experience
features.acceptance: UI works on mobile devices

features.description: Accessibility - WCAG 2.1 compliance
features.acceptance: Screen reader support, keyboard navigation

features.description: Deployment - Vercel/Render hosting setup
features.acceptance: App deployed to production URL

features.description: Testing - Unit and integration tests
features.acceptance: 80%+ code coverage, CI/CD pipeline
